TRAVELERS INSURANCE
TEMPORARY COVERAGE BINDER

This binder is issued pursuant to the Travelers Binding Authority Agreement
TBA-2024-44 and evidences the existence of temporary coverage pending the
issuance of a full policy.

-----------------------------------------------------------------
BINDER NUMBER:               BND-TRV-2025-0312
BINDING AUTHORITY REFERENCE: TBA-2024-44
ANTICIPATED POLICY NUMBER:   TRV-CP-2025-8801
-----------------------------------------------------------------

INSURED:
    Riverside Logistics LLC
    2200 Port Avenue, Building D
    Elizabeth, NJ 07206
    DBA: Riverside Last-Mile

PRODUCER OF RECORD:
    Riverside Commercial Insurance Group
    220 Riverside Drive, Suite 400
    Newark, NJ 07102
    Contact: certs@riversidecommercial.com | (973) 555-0166

CARRIER:
    The Travelers Indemnity Company
    NAIC #: 25658

-----------------------------------------------------------------
BINDER EFFECTIVE DATE:       03/12/2025  (12:01 AM local time)
BINDER EXPIRATION DATE:      04/11/2025  (12:01 AM local time)
BINDER TERM:                 30 days
-----------------------------------------------------------------

COVERAGES BOUND UNDER THIS BINDER:

+-------------------------+----------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+
| COVERAGE                | BINDER POLICY #      | EFF         | EXP         | LIMITS                    |
+-------------------------+----------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+
| Commercial General Liab | TRV-GL-2025-8801-BND | 03/12/2025  | 04/11/2025  | Each Occurrence $1,000,000|
|                         |                      |             |             | Gen Aggregate   $2,000,000|
|                         |                      |             |             | Prods-Comp Ops  $2,000,000|
+-------------------------+----------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+
| Automobile Liability    | TRV-CA-2025-8801-BND | 03/12/2025  | 04/11/2025  | Combined Single Limit     |
|                         |                      |             |             |                 $1,000,000|
+-------------------------+----------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+

DESCRIPTION OF OPERATIONS:
Newly acquired subsidiary. 30-day binder pending full policy issuance.
Operations: third-party logistics, last-mile delivery, and small-package
warehousing. Certificate holder Metro Development Partners named as
additional insured on the GL policy per contract dated 03/10/2025.

CONDITIONS:
1. This binder is NOT a policy of insurance. It confirms that temporary
   coverage is in effect between the dates shown above, subject to the
   terms, conditions, and exclusions of the anticipated policy.
2. The full policy is expected to issue on or before the binder expiration
   date. If the full policy is not issued by 04/11/2025, coverage under
   this binder terminates automatically at 12:01 AM on that date.
3. Premium: interim premium of $4,125 due on bind. Final premium will be
   computed at policy issuance based on audited exposures.

-----------------------------------------------------------------
Page 1 of 2
-----------------------------------------------------------------

BINDER AUTHORITY:
This binder is issued by Riverside Commercial Insurance Group under the
Travelers Binding Authority Agreement TBA-2024-44 effective 2024-07-01.
Riverside Commercial has written authority from Travelers to bind commercial
liability and commercial automobile coverage for eligible classes within the
limits set forth in the authority agreement.

COUNTERSIGNED:
   _____________________________        _____________________________
   Riverside Commercial (producer)      The Travelers Indemnity Company
   Lucia Hernandez, AOR                 (electronically bound via TBA-2024-44)
   Date: 03/12/2025                     Date: 03/12/2025

The Travelers Indemnity Company
One Tower Square, Hartford, CT 06183
commercial-binders@travelers.com

Page 2 of 2
